title: Windows Kerberoasting Attack
description: Detects Kerberoasting techniques using tools or PowerShell commands that request TGS tickets for service accounts to crack offline.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*Rubeus*' or 'Command Line' like '*kerberoast*')) or (('Command Line' like '*Invoke-Kerberoast*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-SPNUsers*' or 'Command Line' like '*Request-SPNTicket*')) or ('Process Name' like '*setspn.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*-Q */**'))
falsepositives: SPN enumeration by service account management tools
